[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up photo shows a young person sitting indoors in front of a patterned backdrop, with large overlay text at the bottom reading “TERTAWA TAPI TERLUKA”.

The main subject is a young person with short, dark, slightly wavy hair, facing the camera and smiling with their mouth slightly open. They wear a dark top with a light, possibly beige collar visible at the neckline.

Setting:
The person appears seated in a chair with a dark backrest. Behind them is a wall or panel with a black-and-white pattern of shapes and lines, plus a blue area on the right side of the background.

Visual Details:
The image has a soft, slightly blurry, low-resolution look. Lighting is even and indoor, with the face in the foreground and the background less sharp. The composition is tightly framed from the upper torso up, angled straight toward the subject, and the overlay text covers the lower portion of the image.

Visible Text:

Practical Summary:
The image is a close-up of a smiling person in a seated position indoors. Bold text is overlaid at the bottom, and the background is patterned with a blue section on the right.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

TERTAWA TAPI TERLU KA

- TERTAWA TAPI TERLUKA

# Notes

- The screenshot text appears to read **“TERTAWA TAPI TERLU KA”**, but it is likely meant to be **“TERTAWA TAPI TERLUKA”** (spacing ambiguity in the image).

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
